discrepancies.subject: W1 bundled Lean stack into Program C; W2 endorses splitting into Move 7 BUT with PCF-vs-CNP caveat

discrepancies.cli_agent_position: R1 -- split Lean into standalone Program 4 / Move 7 because formalization is distinct credentialing track
discrepancies.w2_position: Promote Move 7 to load-bearing BUT distinguish: Tunnell CNP = general Lean competence; PCF credentialing requires Lean-formalized fragment of PCF stratification itself (d=2 discriminant predicate or BT formal-level theorem)
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT W2 caveat. L2 checkpoint 2026-06-15 should add scoping for PCF-result Lean work alongside Mathlib-drift/OPT_X2 handling on existing CNP corpus.

discrepancies.subject: Move 1 readiness assertion -- W2 ratifies sufficiency BUT reframes from open-ended check to cutoff-date forcing function

discrepancies.w2_position: Sufficiency YES (6-point evidence); reframe question -- explicit minimum scope + cutoff date 2026-07-01 rather than open-ended readiness check; converts loop to forcing function
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT cutoff-date reframe. Operator action: confirm 2026-07-01 cutoff (or substitute date); flagship draft begins post-72h-window with cutoff-date discipline.

discrepancies.subject: First Move 5 outreach target -- CLI agent picked Adamczewski; W2 prefers Zeilberger as #1
discrepancies.cli_agent_position: Adamczewski first (PCF transcendence relevance + institutional gravitas)
discrepancies.w2_position: Zeilberger first: Wimp-Zeilberger 1985 load-bearing in BT-baseline + famously responsive to outsiders + championed computationally-driven math; Adamczewski as #2 follow-up
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT Zeilberger-first sequence. Draft Zeilberger letter this turn.

discrepancies.subject: JMM 2027 conference strategy -- contributed talk vs special-session invitation asymmetry

discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT. Operator action: survey JMM 2027 special-session organizer announcements; identify 1-2 candidates for outreach.
